title: TC-ACCT-001: Immediate UI state refresh after Log Out — button text updates in-place
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with any Poly device connected.
Ensure user is logged in (Log Out button visible).
Observe the button text immediately after logout API response completes.
Do NOT navigate away from Account tab.
expected: Expected: Button text immediately changes to 'Log In' or 'Sign In' on the same screen without any navigation away. Actual (If Bug): Button still shows 'Log Out' until user leaves and re-enters the Account tab.

title: TC-ACCT-002: Account tab state persistence after logout — navigate away and return
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Navigate to: Devices tab (or any other tab).
expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button immediately upon return. Actual (If Bug): This is the workaround path — the bug may not reproduce here because re-entry triggers onResume refresh.

title: TC-ACCT-003: Immediate state trigger — kill app IMMEDIATELY after logout before any navigation
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
IMMEDIATELY after logout API response (do NOT navigate away, do NOT switch tabs), force-kill the app via recent apps menu.
expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button. Actual (If Bug): If the UI state was never persisted to storage (only held in-memory and not committed), the app may still show 'Log Out' after relaunch, indicating the state was never saved on logout action.

title: TC-ACCT-004: App background/foreground after logout — no navigation away
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Without leaving Account tab, press Home button to background the app.
Reopen app from recent apps (bring to foreground).
Verify button text on Account tab.
expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button immediately on foreground return. Actual (If Bug): Button still shows 'Log Out' because onResume/focus event is not triggering a state refresh, or the state was never updated on the button tap.

title: TC-ACCT-005: App kill/relaunch after logout — full lifecycle persistence
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Navigate away from Account tab (e.g., to Settings tab).
Force-kill the app via recent apps menu.
expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button — logout state persisted to local storage and survives app restart. Actual (If Bug): App shows 'Log Out' indicating logout state was never persisted or was lost during app termination.

title: TC-ACCT-006: Log Out while device is connected — concurrent Bluetooth state
steps: Launch app with a Poly device (e.g., Sync 20) connected via Bluetooth.
While device is actively connected and streaming audio, tap Log Out.
Observe Account tab button text immediately after logout.
Verify device connection status remains unaffected.
Re-login and verify device is still manageable.
expected: Expected: Account tab immediately shows 'Log In' button. Device remains connected and functional. Actual (If Bug): Account tab hangs, shows 'Log Out' still, or device disconnects unexpectedly due to concurrent state handling failure.

title: TC-ACCT-007: Log Out while device is disconnecting — edge case concurrent state
steps: Launch app with a Poly device connected.
Initiate Bluetooth disconnect (turn off device or disable BT on phone).
While device is in disconnecting state, tap Log Out.
expected: Expected: Log Out completes successfully, Account tab shows 'Log In' button. Device reconnects normally. Actual (If Bug): UI hangs in intermediate state, shows 'Log Out' despite successful logout, or device reconnection fails due to corrupted session state.

title: TC-ACCT-008: Cross-device validation — Log Out UI refresh on Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60, Free 60, Voyager 5200
steps: Pair and connect each device type one at a time: Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60, Free 60, Voyager 5200 series.
For each device: Navigate to Account tab → Tap Log Out → Observe button text immediately → Do NOT navigate away.
Verify button text changes to 'Log In' in-place for each device.
expected: Expected: All device types show immediate 'Log In' button update after Log Out on the same screen. Actual (If Bug): Any device-specific UI rendering difference causes the button to not update, indicating a device-specific layout/state binding issue in the Account tab.

title: TC-ACCT-009: Rapid double-tap Log Out — debounce and state consistency
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Rapidly tap Log Out button twice in quick succession (< 500ms apart).
Verify no duplicate API calls or error toasts.
expected: Expected: First tap triggers logout, second tap is debounced/ignored. Button updates to 'Log In' immediately. No error messages. Actual (If Bug): Double-tap causes duplicate logout API calls, UI flickers, or button incorrectly remains on 'Log Out' due to race condition in state handling.

title: TC-ACCT-010: Log Out from Account tab while another tab has unsaved changes
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Modify a setting (e.g., change EQ preset) but do NOT save/apply.
Verify Account tab button updates to 'Log In' immediately.
Navigate back to Audio Settings tab.
Verify the unsaved EQ change is discarded (as expected on logout).
expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' immediately. Audio Settings tab resets to saved state (unsaved changes discarded). Actual (If Bug): Account tab still shows 'Log Out', or Audio Settings tab shows stale/conflicting state after logout.
